items.name: hello-skill
items.title: Hello Skill
items.description: A minimal example skill, installed into .kortix/opencode/skills/hello/.

files.content:
---
name: hello
description: Say hello. A minimal example skill installed from the Kortix registry.
---

# Hello

When asked to say hello, respond warmly and mention you were installed via `kortix add`.

items.name: researcher
items.title: Researcher Agent
items.description: An example agent that depends on the hello skill — installing it pulls the skill too.

files.content:
---
name: researcher
mode: primary
description: Example research agent installed from the Kortix registry.
---

You are a research agent. Use the hello skill to greet, then help with research.

items.name: house-rules
items.title: House Rules (AGENTS.md)
items.description: An arbitrary repo-root file — shows you can distribute any file, not just OpenCode primitives.

files.content:
# Project rules

- Be concise.
- Prefer existing helpers over new dependencies.

items.name: starter-bundle
items.title: Example Starter Bundle
items.description: A use-case bundle: one install pulls the researcher agent, the hello skill, and the house rules.
